Part.Source:
&outsdtCadastroPDV.StsCom = 'N' &DataHora = servernow() &outsdtCadastroPDV.DataUltSync = toformattedString(&DataHora) //RetornaVersaoPDV_Aplicacao.Call(&outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvVer, &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvVerApl)
do Case CAse &insdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer = 'CAD'
For Each Order PdvValidacao //PDV nao sabe quem é a empresa ainda. Where PdvValidacao = &insdtCadastroPDV.CodigoValidacao Where PdvStsSync = Status_Pdv.PENDENTE
&PdvCod = PdvCod &EmpCod = EmpCod
&outsdtCadastroPDV.Sts = 'J200' &outsdtCadastroPDV.Msg = 'Sucesso'
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpCod = EmpCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.FilCod = PdvFilCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer = &insdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvCod = PdvCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvCtaBanCod = PdvCtaBanCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvId = PdvId &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvRandon = PdvRandon &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvTefBanCarCod = PdvTefBanCarCod &PdvTefBanCarCod = PdvTefBanCarCod do 'getTef' do 'getUltimoCaixa' &outsdtCadastroPDV.pdvPriCx = &CxCod
&outsdtCadastroPDV.StsCom = 'S' &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvNfeSer65 = PdvNfeSer65 &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvTefCom = PdvTefCom
&outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvPixCbrCod = PdvPixCbrCod
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpVerPdvMin = EmpVerPDV //min buildNumber &outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpVerPdvNew = EmpVerPdvNew //New builNumber
&HojeData = EmpVerPdvNewDtaLim if not &HojeData.IsEmpty() &HojeData = serverdate() &HojeData = &HojeData.AddDays(365)
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpVerPdvNewDtaLimTmp = DateToTimestamp.Udp(&HojeData) //dataLimite Else
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpVerPdvNewDtaLimTmp = DateToTimestamp.Udp(EmpVerPdvNewDtaLim) //dataLimite Endif
PdvStsSync = Status_Pdv.INSTALADO Exit When none &outsdtCadastroPDV.Sts = 'E998' &outsdtCadastroPDV.Msg = 'PDV Já Configurado!' return EndFor
Commit
CAse &insdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer = 'UPD'
For Each Order EmpCod, PdvCod Where PdvRandon = &insdtCadastroPDV.PdvRandon &EmpCod = EmpCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.Sts = 'J200' &outsdtCadastroPDV.Msg = 'Sucesso'
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpCod = EmpCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvCod = PdvCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvImpCod = PdvImpCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvCtaBanCod = PdvCtaBanCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvNfeSer65 = PdvNfeSer65 &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvTefBanCarCod = PdvTefBanCarCod &PdvTefBanCarCod = PdvTefBanCarCod do 'getTef' &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvTefCom = PdvTefCom &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvTipFec = PdvTipFec &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvPixCbrCod = PdvPixCbrCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.StsCom = 'S' &outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpVerPdvMin = EmpVerPDV //min buildNumber &outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpVerPdvNew = EmpVerPdvNew //New builNumber &HojeData = EmpVerPdvNewDtaLim if not &HojeData.IsEmpty() &HojeData = serverdate() &HojeData = &HojeData.AddDays(365)
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpVerPdvNewDtaLimTmp = DateToTimestamp.Udp(&HojeData) //dataLimite Else
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpVerPdvNewDtaLimTmp = DateToTimestamp.Udp(EmpVerPdvNewDtaLim) //dataLimite Endif
Exit When none &outsdtCadastroPDV.Sts = 'E998' &outsdtCadastroPDV.Msg = 'PDV não localizado!' return EndFor
CAse &insdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer = 'FIN'
For Each Order EmpCod, PdvCod Where PdvRandon = &insdtCadastroPDV.PdvRandon
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpCod = EmpCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvCod = PdvCod
&outsdtCadastroPDV.Sts = 'J200' &outsdtCadastroPDV.Msg = 'Sucesso'
&outsdtCadastroPDV.StsCom = 'S'
PdvUltSync = now() PdvVer = &insdtCadastroPDV.PdvVer
Exit When none &outsdtCadastroPDV.Sts = 'E998' &outsdtCadastroPDV.Msg = 'PDV não localizado!' return EndFor
Commit EndCase
Sub 'getUltimoCaixa' &CxCod = 0
For each Order EmpCod, CxPdvCod, (CxCod) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CxPdvCod = &PdvCod
&CxCod = CxCod
Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'getTef' For Each Order EmpCod, CbrCod Where EmpCod = &EmPCod Where BanCarCod = &PdvTefBanCarCod Do CAse CAse BanCarIsTEF = 'L' &outsdtCadastroPDV.pdvTefTip = 'LINX' CAse BanCarIsTEF = 'J' &outsdtCadastroPDV.pdvTefTip = 'ZOOP' EndCase
EndFor EndSub
